meaning: adj.绒毛的,柔和的,多丘岗的,丘原的
examples: Pockets make the best pockets. Vaginas are too upside-downy to make for good pockets.
Seals that are weaned and have shed their downy fur are called beaters for the way they beat their flippers on the water.
She pointed to the largest of the eggs, which had a downy feather stuck to it.
Both juvenile and adult specimens had evidence of downy feathers, but only an adult had wing-like structures.
